## Problem

What player, maintainer, safety, or reliability problem does this PR address?

## Approach

Describe the implementation and important alternatives considered.

## System impact

- [ ] Gameplay rules or scoring
- [ ] Hidden information or permissions
- [ ] Multiplayer state or reconnect behavior
- [ ] AI prompts, providers, validation, or fallback
- [ ] UGC provenance, moderation, reporting, or privacy
- [ ] Data schema or migration
- [ ] User-facing UI or accessibility

Explain checked areas:

## Validation

- [ ] `npm run lint`
- [ ] `npm test`
- [ ] `npm run build`
- [ ] Added or updated automated tests
- [ ] Manually tested relevant gameplay path
- [ ] Added screenshots for UI changes

## AI assistance disclosure

- [ ] No material AI assistance
- [ ] AI assisted implementation, testing, review, or documentation

If assisted, describe the tool and what the human author verified:

## Safety and provenance

- [ ] No secrets or private player data are included.
- [ ] New visual assets have documented ownership or compatible licenses.
- [ ] External model output is treated as untrusted and validated.
- [ ] Moderation-impacting behavior is documented.

## Follow-up work

List intentionally deferred work, known risks, or migration steps.
